calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: DR-13 self-recurrence substrate-readiness falsifier (self_model_v4:SELF-1, z_self temporal depth)
items.note: Second V4 experiment (diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING; claim_ids=[]; unblocks ARC-081/MECH-215). Substrate-readiness probe for the DR-13 lever landed ree-v3 main 8807789 (use_self_recurrence: dedicated GRUCell self-recurrence over z_self + E1-feedback anchor, replaces the z_self EMA step only). Synthetic no-training encode probe (~seconds). FALSIFIER: the recurrence must make z_self carry temporal/self-model state beyond the instantaneous encode (PASS = live + history-carrying + perturbation-isolable stateful subject + E1-anchor blend live); non-vacuity precondition = state_departure>=floor (else substrate_not_ready_requeue); inert off-ramp = carries no history (dr13_recurrence_inert). Trained superiority over the fixed-alpha EMA is a DR-10 consumer question, reported secondary only. prefer-cloud. Baseline mint SKIPPED (synthetic trivial forward-pass OFF cell; no expensive reusable trained baseline). owner_exq assigned to self_model_v4:SELF-1.
